levels.body: The word mufflers is not in use anymore, according to the *OED*. Today, the term "a glove, [or] a mitten" is more common ("mufflers", *n*. 3. b).
worksCited: "Mufflers, *n*. 3. b", *OED Online*, Oxford University Press, October 2020, https://www.oed.com/view/Entry/123314?redirectedFrom=mufflers#eid. Accessed 1 October 2020.
